positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a cosmic forest meeting a vibrant, abstract cityscape at sunset. The scene features monolithic, bioluminescent trees casting deep cyan and magenta shadows, intersecting with geometrically perfect, translucent skyscrapers. The mood is ethereal, adventurous, and tranquil. Use a clean silhouette style with highly contrasting colors and strong negative space. Composition is centered, suitable for apparel repeat pattern or main design print. Lighting should be dramatic rim lighting from a low, setting celestial body, emphasizing strong contours and clean lines. High detail, digital vector art aesthetic, trending on ArtStation, deep depth of field, ultra-sharp, high contrast, limited color palette of blues, purples, and oranges.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, artifact, noise, smudge, messy, cartoon, photorealistic, bokeh, grainy
